footer.tagline: The digital home for the Karuneegar community — connecting families, celebrating heritage, and building a prosperous future together.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Karuneegar Central. Built with ❤️ for the community.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.subtitle: Your digital home to connect with family, celebrate heritage, explore business opportunities, and find life partners within the community.
home.featuresSubtitle: One platform built with purpose — for the Karuneegar community, by the community.
home.featureProfilesDesc: Connect with community members, discover shared roots, and build lasting friendships.
home.featureFamilyTreeDesc: Map your family lineage, preserve history, and trace your ancestral connections.
home.featureForumsDesc: Exchange ideas, seek advice, and grow together through community-powered discussions.
home.featureMatrimonyDesc: Find your life partner within the community — with trust, values, and heritage.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Karuneegar community members already building connections.

auth.mobileFirst: Please enter your mobile number first.
auth.internationalHint: Please enter your email above — OTP will be sent there for international numbers.
auth.otpEmailHint: OTP will be sent to your email address above.
auth.otpPrompt: Enter the 5-digit code sent to your {{destination}}
auth.mobilePublicConsent: Allow other community members to see my mobile number
auth.mobilePublicHint: If unchecked, your number will be hidden from other members. You can change this anytime in your profile settings.

members.title: Community Members
members.subtitle: Connect with fellow Karuneegar community members.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, location, or occupation…

profile.privateProfileMsg: This member has chosen to keep their profile private.
profile.noBusinessYet: You haven't created a business profile yet.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.privacyDesc: Control whether your profile is visible in the community directory.
editProfile.mobileVisibilityDesc: Choose whether other members can see your verified mobile number.
editProfile.achievementsPlaceholder: Describe your key achievements, entrepreneurial ventures, or contributions to the community…
editProfile.achievementsHint: This will be shown on your profile and in the Prominent Figures section.
editProfile.prominentDesc: For members aged 50+ who are established entrepreneurs or prominent figures in their profession.

matrimony.title: Matrimony
matrimony.subtitle: Find your life partner within the Karuneegar community
matrimony.noProfilesDesc: Be the first to create a matrimony profile!
matrimony.photoHint: Upload a clear, recent photo. Recommended portrait orientation.
matrimony.photoResizeHint: Photo will be resized to medium quality automatically.
matrimony.photoProtectHint: Only you can change or remove your photo.
matrimony.phoneVisibilityDesc: Choose whether your phone number is visible to other members.

scholarship.title: Scholarships
scholarship.subtitle: Community members offering and seeking scholarship support.
scholarship.noOpportunitiesDesc: Be the first to offer a scholarship to the community!
scholarship.noRequestsDesc: No one has requested scholarship support yet.
scholarship.offerTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Merit Scholarship for Engineering Students
scholarship.requestTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Seeking support for B.E. admission
scholarship.offerDescPlaceholder: Describe the scholarship, purpose, and how to apply…
scholarship.requestDescPlaceholder: Share your background, need, and how the scholarship will help you…
scholarship.eligibilityPlaceholder: Who can apply? Marks, income limit, community criteria…
scholarship.postFailed: Failed to post. Please try again.

familyTree.title: Family Tree
familyTree.loginPrompt: Please log in to view and manage your family tree.
familyTree.noMembersDesc: Start building your family tree by adding members.
familyTree.name: Name

forums.title: Business Forums
forums.subtitle: Discuss, collaborate, and grow with the community.
forums.threadBodyPlaceholder: Share your thoughts, questions, or ideas…
forums.noThreadsDesc: Be the first to start a discussion!

businesses.title: Community Businesses
businesses.subtitle: Discover businesses run by Karuneegar community members.
businesses.noBusinessesDesc: Set your occupation to Business or Self-Employed and create a business profile.
businesses.taglinePlaceholder: A short catchy line about your business
businesses.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell people about your business, products, or services…

visibility.title: Share Your Profile?
visibility.subtitle: Help your community connect with you by making your profile visible in the member directory.
visibility.yesShareDesc: My name, occupation, location, and gothram will be visible to community members.
visibility.keepPrivateDesc: Only you can see your profile. You can change this anytime in Edit Profile.
visibility.changeNote: You can always change your preference later in Edit Profile → Privacy.

about.title: About Karuneegars
about.subtitle: An ancient community of honour — the celestial record-keepers of Tamil civilisation, rooted in two millennia of dharmic tradition.
about.contentCredit: Content adapted from karuneegars.blogspot.com — the original source for Karuneegar community history and heritage.
about.ctaDesc: Join Karuneegar Central — your digital home to connect with family, preserve heritage, and build a stronger community.
